commit_scope: Move the next observed API route families into the BML native front door and repair native-route wellness accounting to include the BML catalog.

commands: python3 baseline comparison: current deploy/front-door/api.bml strict unresolved names match origin/main exactly
local_validation.notes: Added BML native handlers for GET /api/sensings, GET /api/sensings/{sensing_id}, and GET /api/translations/{entity_type}/{entity_id}. The web_api route-goal window rose from 89.10% high-grammar native before the change to 90.50% after, with no next web-used route needed in the observed window. Local native smoke proved promoted routes select X-Form-Router:native-kernel and the intentionally unpromoted deploy SSE route stays X-Form-Router:fanout-python. No local Postgres was configured, so DB-backed promoted reads returned the native persistence-unavailable boundary; body readback remains deploy proof. Strict BML catalog check still reports 14 unresolved names, and a current-vs-origin comparison proved the unresolved set is unchanged by this branch.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push, PR creation, and hosted checks.

deploy_validation.notes: No deploy attempted before PR merge. runtime_surface_report now distinguishes 45 currently deployed native front-door routes from 86 local capable native handlers across Form+BML.

phase_gate.reason: Local proof passed; PR CI, merge, deploy, and public post-deploy verification remain pending.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The BML front door natively handles sensings list/detail reads and generic translation entity reads; runtime-surface wellness counts both Form manifest and BML catalog capabilities while live served count remains sourced from the deployed router measurement.
e2e_validation.proof: Local native listener returned X-Form-Router:native-kernel for /api/sensings and /api/translations/page/flow, returned native 400 validation for invalid sensings kind, and returned X-Form-Router:fanout-python for /api/deploy/log/stream.
test_flows: Native sensings list route selects the kernel and reaches the native persistence boundary when local DB is absent.
Native sensings invalid-kind route returns the expected 400 validation shape without Python fanout.
Native generic translation page route selects the kernel and reaches the native persistence boundary when local DB is absent.
Deploy log SSE remains explicit fanout-python until native streaming is promoted.

evidence_refs: deploy/front-door/api.bml defines api_sensings, api_sensing_detail, api_translations_entity, and their RouteCell bindings.
docs/system_audit/native_route_goal_state.json reports bml_routes=53, goal_native_share=0.905, native_executable_share=0.905, and next_route=null for the web_api window.
scripts/runtime_surface_report.py reports kernel_first_capable_routes=86 and kernel_first_deployed_native_route_count=45, separating local capability from deployed served count.
Focused pytest proof passed 20 tests across route-goal, runtime-surface, translations, and source-artifact sensing coverage.
